test_goal: Verify that the login form shows an error for an invalid email
Verify successful login redirects to dashboard
Verify a paginated list loads more items when scrolling
setup: Seed 30 items in DB; page loads 10 at a time

assertions.playwright:
const count = await page.locator('.list-item').count();
await expect(count).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(20)

test_goal: Verify file upload accepts valid files and rejects invalid types

assertions.playwright:
await fileInput.setInputFiles({ name: 'virus.exe', mimeType: 'application/octet-stream', buffer: Buffer.from('fake-data') });
await expect(page.locator('[data-testid="upload-error"]')).toContainText('Invalid file type');

test_goal: Verify API error is handled gracefully in the UI
playwright_setup: await page.route('/api/bills', route => route.fulfill({ status: 500, body: JSON.stringify({ error: 'Internal Server Error' }) }));
notes: Always test error states. A good UI never crashes on API failures.

test_goal: Verify that a deleted item is removed from the list without page refresh
setup: Seed 5 items; capture item ID of item[0]

test_goal: Verify search input filters list items
Verify clicking retry reloads data after transient error
